description: The Falcon Intel Reports API allows to query CrowdStrike intelligence publications.

outputs.description: The report ID. FalconIntel.Report.URL The report URL.
outputs.name: FalconIntel.Report.ID

outputs.description: The report name. FalconIntel.Report.Type The report type.
outputs.name: FalconIntel.Report.Name

outputs.description: The report sub type. FalconIntel.Report.Slug Slug name of the report
outputs.name: FalconIntel.Report.SubType

outputs.description: Date The date the report was created. FalconIntel.Report.LastModifiedSate
outputs.name: FalconIntel.Report.CreatedDate

outputs.description: The date the report was last modified. FalconIntel.Report.ShortDescription The report short description.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: The report full description. FalconIntel.Report.TargetIndustries Targeted industries included in the report. Ex: aerospace
outputs.name: FalconIntel.Report.Description

outputs.description: Targeted countries included in the report. Ex: afghanistan FalconIntel.Report.Motivations Motivations included in the report. Ex: criminal
outputs.name: FalconIntel.Report.TargetCountries
